data.title: Ferrari released its 2025 Annual Report & filed Form 20-F with SEC, incl financials for fiscal year ended Dec 31, 2025.
data.description: In Italy, on February 19, 2026, Ferrari N.V. (NYSE/EXM: RACE) revealed its 2025 Annual Report and submitted its Form 20-F annual report to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission, containing financial data for the year concluding on December 31, 2025. Additionally, the 2025 Sustainability Statement, adhering to the European Sustainability Reporting Standard (ESRS) guidelines voluntarily, has been incorporated into the 2025 Annual Report.

data.title: Lambda Appoints Charles Fisher as CFO. Fisher to lead financial operations. Joins from Turo, former CFO at Charter.
data.description: Lambda, the Superintelligence Cloud based in San Francisco, has recently appointed Charles Fisher as its new Chief Financial Officer. Fisher, who previously held the same position at Turo, the world’s largest car-sharing marketplace, and served as EVP of Corporate Finance & Development at Charter Communications, will be responsible for overseeing Lambda’s capital strategy and financial operations as the company prepares for further expansion. Lambda is entering its next phase of growth under Fisher’s leadership.

data.title: Inventor from South Hill, VA creates LINE IT UP training aid to prevent slicing/hooking in golf; helps ensure square ball contact.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on February 19, 2026, an inventor from South Hill, Virginia, shared their creation of the LINE IT UP, a directional guide aimed at assisting golfers in achieving square contact with the ball to prevent slicing or hooking. The inventor's innovative design is believed to promote longer and more accurate shots on the golf course.

data.title: Boehringer Ingelheim gets FDA approval for NexGard Chewables and COMBO to treat New World screwworm in pets.
data.description: The FDA has approved the emergency usage of NexGard® Chewables and NexGard® COMBO for combating New World screwworm infestations in dogs and cats. NexGard® Chewables, containing afoxolaner, and NexGard® COMBO, which has esafoxolaner, eprinomectin, and praziquantel, are now authorized to assist veterinarians and pet owners in treating this issue. The approval comes as cases of New World screwworm infestations continue to rise, necessitating the use of these products to address the growing concern.

data.title: GitHub sees 36 million new developers in 2025, indicating growing pains for open source ahead due to AI slop and maintainer burnout.
data.description: According to the Octoverse 2025 data from GitHub, there has been a significant increase in the number of developers, reaching record levels. However, the report also highlights potential challenges facing open source sustainability, such as AI slop and maintainer burnout. These issues could impact the growth and stability of the open source community. It is crucial for stakeholders to address these concerns to ensure the continued success of open source projects.

data.title: MCU Foundation donates $150,000 to Ronald McDonald House Greater Hudson Valley for meal programs, aiding families in medical need.
data.description: In New York, the MCU Foundation, associated with Municipal Credit Union, revealed a generous $150,000 donation to the Ronald McDonald House of the Greater Hudson Valley (RMHGHV). This substantial grant aims to assist numerous families accommodated by RMHGHV as their children undergo crucial medical treatments and receive care. The donation from the MCU Foundation will specifically aid RMHGHV's meal initiatives, facilitating the provision of thousands of freshly cooked meals to families residing at the Ronald McDonald House.

data.title: Eagle Wireless secures $30M Series B to boost R&D, U.S. device production. Asymmetric Capital Partners leads financing.
data.description: In Cleveland on February 19, 2026, Eagle Wireless, a top cellular module producer in the U.S., revealed the completion of a significant $30 million Series B funding round. Asymmetric Capital Partners and The O.H.I.O. Fund spearheaded this successful financing. This infusion boosts Eagle Wireless' overall capital and signifies a strong vote of confidence in the company's growth potential.

data.title: Wayfair stock tumbled as active customer decline caused concern. Q4 sales of $3.3 billion were up 6.9%, but active customers dropped 0.5% to 21.3 million.
data.description: Wayfair Inc. (NYSE: W) experienced a drop in stock value following the release of their fiscal fourth-quarter 2025 results. The company reported earnings per share of 85 cents for the quarter, surpassing the analyst estimate of 66 cents. Quarterly sales reached $3.337 billion, marking a 6.9% increase from the previous year and beating the projected $3.301 billion. The number of active customers decreased by 0.5% year over year to 21.3 million as of December 31, 2025. Total net revenue, excluding the impact of exiting the German market, grew by 7.8% year over year. U.S. net revenue saw a 7.4% increase, totaling $2.9 billion. For more details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Axuall launches feature to identify clinicians for rural areas. Industry leader in clinical workforce intelligence, Feb. 19, 2026.
data.description: Axuall Explore, a leading provider of clinical workforce intelligence, has introduced a new tool designed to address the challenges of filling highly demanding healthcare positions. In a recent announcement made on February 19, 2026, in Cleveland, the company unveiled this innovative feature aimed at identifying capable physicians and advanced practice providers to meet the critical staffing needs in the industry. This development marks a significant advancement in the healthcare sector, offering solutions for some of the most complex positions. With expertise in this field, Axuall is paving the way for improved recruitment processes, showcasing their commitment to enhancing workforce management.

data.title: Rosalind Franklin Univ. partners with CCRII for 10-year lease, expanding research site. #Innovation #ClinicalResearch
data.description: In North Chicago, Illinois, on February 19, 2026, Rosalind Franklin University of Medicine and Science (RFU) disclosed the initiation of a significant 10-year lease pact with the Chicago Clinical Research Institute, Inc. (CCRII). This move signifies a notable enhancement of clinical research capabilities for RFU.

data.title: Fed Home Loan Bank of Dallas reported $126.2M net income for Q4 2025, down from $174.4M in Q4 2024. Total assets not disclosed.
data.description: The Federal Home Loan Bank of Dallas announced a net income of $126.2 million for the quarter ending December 31, 2025. This is a decrease from $156.7 million in the previous quarter (September 30, 2025) and $174.4 million in the same quarter of 2024. For the entirety of 2025, the Bank recorded a net income of $582.6 million, down from $726.6 million in 2024. As of December 31, 2025, the Bank's total assets were not provided in the information available.

data.title: Inventors from Courtland, Va create TRINITY PUNCH, a new well-being drink offering health benefits.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on February 19, 2026, two inventors from Courtland, Va. unveiled their creation of a new well-being beverage called TRINITY PUNCH. Their goal was to provide various health benefits with this formula, presenting it as a healthy substitute to conventional juices.

data.description: A wealth management company, Aventura Private Wealth, based in Aventura, Florida, revealed on February 19, 2026, that it has completed a subsequent investment round linked to Anduril Industries shares via its alternatives platform, Aventura Defense Ventures. data.title: Deere & Company reported Q1 FY26 results. Net sales and revenues increased by 13% to $9.611B, net income was $656M or $2.42 per share. Operating margin for equipment ops stood at 5.9%. Results exceeded forecasts, with segments showing growth: Small Ag and turf, Construction Forestry. Global large ag and South American ag equip markets faced challenges. Projected mid-single digit net sales growth for equipment ops in FY26. Financial services net income in Q1 was $244M, outlook for FY26 raised to $840M. Net income guide for FY26 increased to $4.5-5B. Operating cash flow expected to be $4.5-5.5B. Market outlooks for ag and turf: large ag in US, Canada expected to decline 15-20%, global markets vary. Construction forestry markets expected to be up around 5%. Operationally, Deere focused on managing production volumes and inventories to meet demand. Industry demand outlook improved over the quarter. Stabilization seen in global and US ag markets, with some rise in end market demand amidst government support measures. Global ag inventories and order books show positive trends, aiding future demand expectations.
data.description: In their first-quarter financial report, Deere & Company (NYSE: DE) announced an operating margin of 5.9% for equipment operations with a diversified portfolio showing strength. They reported net sales and revenues of 9.611 billion, with equipment operations generating 8.001 billion in net sales, resulting in a net income of 656 million or $2.42 per diluted share. Small ag and turf, and Construction Forestry segments experienced over 20% growth in net sales, while Deere expects mid-single digit net sales growth for the fiscal year. The global large ag fundamentals remained stable, leading to modest improvements in North American large ag sales. Additionally, the Construction Forestry industry is projected to grow by around 15%, with improvements in all sectors. Deere's net income outlook for fiscal year 2026 is between $4.5 and $5 billion. The company credits higher shipment volumes and operational efficiencies for their better-than-expected performance. An increase in order activity and expanding order books have led to a positive outlook for future growth.

data.title: Teampay by Paystand ranked #26 on G2’s 2026 Best ERP list, showcasing modern CFO finance innovation.
data.description: In Santa Cruz, California, Teampay by Paystand has achieved the impressive ranking of #26 on G2's first-ever Best ERP list. This recognition highlights the innovative financial strategies for modern CFOs.
